evals.prompt: Create a flowchart mermaid diagram for: User -> Web -> API -> DB. Put it in docs/diagrams/auth.md
evals.expected_output: A Markdown file at docs/diagrams/auth.md containing a mermaid flowchart code block

evals.prompt: Draw a sequence diagram showing: Browser requests page, Server returns HTML, Browser requests API, Server returns JSON.
evals.expected_output: Assistant asks where to create the file (no file specified) and then produces a Markdown file with a `sequenceDiagram` mermaid block

evals.prompt: Make a class diagram for these components: User (id, name), Post (id, title, author_id), Comment (id, post_id, author_id).
evals.expected_output: A Markdown snippet containing a `classDiagram` mermaid block mapping the classes and relations
